description: A tenant who received a late notice is still delinquent. The PM must call them to arrange payment.

nodes.task_description: Identify the tenant, their total outstanding balance including late fees, and their phone number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has all necessary information to make the call.

nodes.task_description: Call the tenant to discuss the overdue balance and request payment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent makes the call and clearly communicates the amount due.

nodes.task_description: If the tenant agrees to pay, process a credit card payment over the phone.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully takes a payment and provides a confirmation number to the tenant.
